content:
Write a meta description for this page. Use your knowledge of this site's voice and audience.

Guidelines:
- Maximum 155 characters (strict limit)
- Lead with the direct answer or hook — what will the reader learn or get?
- Include the primary topic/keyword naturally
- Create curiosity or value to encourage clicks
- Don't duplicate the title — expand on it
- No quotes around the description
- One or two sentences

Return ONLY the meta description text, nothing else.

Page context:
{{context}}

variables.context: Post title, content excerpt, categories, and tags
